description: Manual correction overlay for parsed Constitution JSON. Does not mutate raw Docling extraction.

article-1.title: Name and territory of the Union
article-1.body_text:
(1) India, that is Bharat, shall be a Union of States.
(2) The States and the territories thereof shall be as specified in the First Schedule.
(3) The territory of India shall comprise—
(a) the territories of the States;
(b) the Union territories specified in the First Schedule; and
(c) such other territories as may be acquired.

article-2.title: Admission or establishment of new States
article-2.body_text: Parliament may by law admit into the Union, or establish, new States on such terms and conditions as it thinks fit.

notes: article-1: diglot preamble/amendment debris destroyed title and body; restored Bare Act clauses (1)–(3) from intermediate Markdown.
article-2: omitted Article 2A footnote was glued onto Article 2 body; stripped to the Bare Act sentence only.
